flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at San Jacinto Community College rose 33% between 2021 and 2024 ($1.9k → $2.5k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at San Jacinto Community College rose 33% between 2021 and 2024 ($5.0k → $6.7k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at San Jacinto Community College rose 21% between 2006 and 2009 ($3.3k → $4.0k).
